marker_stream.Description: LSL marker stream name that generated this event.

Levels.UoHDataOffsetStream: Marker stream reporting dropped sample counts (e.g., 'Dropped N samples').
Levels.n-backMarkers: Task marker stream for the n-back paradigm.

timestamp_lsl.Description: Original LSL timestamp for this marker.

marker.Description: Raw marker string emitted on the LSL marker stream.

key_press.Description: Whether a response key was pressed on this trial.

matched.Description: Whether the stimulus matched the N-back target on this trial.

dropped_samples.Description: Number of dropped samples reported by the dropout stream.

istutorial.Description: Whether this trial was marked as tutorial (when applicable).
